description:
GIVEN a Postseason game is on the schedule
AND TBS broadcasters are assigned
AND the user has one of the following entitlements: MLBALL, MLBVIDEOADOBEPASS, MLBVIDEOAR
AND the user is authorized for TBS MVPD
AND the game level entitledVideo = true
AND the AWAY (National) feed level tbsAuthRequired = true

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a game tile for a TBS Postseason game tile
steps.result:
THEN the Feed Select modal displays
AND the feed button displays
AND the user is able to initiate playback
